name: Fauna
description: Fauna is a distributed, serverless document-relational database with a native HTTP API. It combines the flexibility of documents with relational features like joins, indexes, and ACID transactions. Query using FQL (Fauna Query Language) over HTTPS with no connection management required.

capabilities.name: query_execute
capabilities.description: Execute an FQL query against your database. Supports reads, writes, aggregations, and complex logic.

capabilities.name: documents_create
capabilities.description: Create a new document in a collection via FQL.

capabilities.name: documents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single document from a collection by its ID.

capabilities.name: documents_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing document by its ID with partial or full replacement.

capabilities.name: documents_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a document from a collection by its ID.

capabilities.name: documents_list
capabilities.description: List documents in a collection with optional pagination using cursors.

capabilities.name: collections_create
capabilities.description: Create a new collection (table) in the database with optional schema constraints.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: List all collections (tables) in the database.

capabilities.name: indexes_create
capabilities.description: Create an index on a collection for efficient queries and sorting.

capabilities.name: tokens_create
capabilities.description: Create a new access token for database authentication with specific role and permissions.
